Hi Shalini Di
a little something for you
I am sorry I forgot that it's your birthday today,
but I hope this makes up for it just a little.
HAPPY BIRTHDAY
Dear Shalini Di,

I know I am late, and I know a message cannot really make up for forgetting your birthday. But I still wanted to pause everything and sit down to write this because you are not just someone I know; you are someone I look up to.

From the very little time we have spent together, you have felt like the elder sister I never had: the kind who checks in, who listens, and who makes you feel like you matter. Distance has never really been a barrier for people who are meant to be in each other's lives, and I truly believe that.

It still fills me with wonder that a chance journey on a train could bring someone like you into my life. In the time since, I have come to realise that you possess a rare, almost breathless kind of goodness. Your kindness, your gentle nature, and the effortless warmth you give to the world are things I deeply admire. You have an astonishing, timeless beauty, both in your spirit and your presence. On this occasion of your birthday, I just wanted to remind you that you deserve all the love, light, and happiness this world can gather. Even then, it would scarcely be enough to match the joy you bring into it.

I hope your day was just as bright and lovely as you are, and that this coming year brings you perfect peace, fulfilment, and every beautiful thing you deserve.

Happy Birthday, Di. Thank you for being you.

Siddharth
(tried writing a poem but couldn't)
sorry for taking the screenshots without permission :)
River Flows in You
